title: Light Caramelized Moroccan Chicken Tagine
description: A herbal and light Moroccan dish featuring garlic granules and caramelized onions, perfect for a brunch mood. This recipe is diabetic-friendly and made with fresh ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until caramelized and golden brown, about 20-25 minutes.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the garlic granules, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened, about 20-25 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot over couscous or rice.
Garnish with additional parsley, if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for later use.
